news.title: ASX bounces back on renewed Iran talk hopes; BHP jumps on China concessions
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket advanced as Donald Trump raised hopes for an Iran deal, and BHP gained on reports of progress in its months-long iron ore tussle with China.

news.title: ASX opens higher; Virgin soars weathering the fuel shock, energy stocks falls
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has rallied on opening, following global markets higher.

news.title: Inside the Albanese Government’s secret sales pitch to justify slashing tax breaks for landlords
news.snippet: Younger voters put him in power. Now the PM is preparing to reward them with a tax shake-up that will enrage property barons.

news.title: TMK throws doors open to partners for Mongolian gas project
news.snippet: TMK Energy launched a farm-out for its Mongolian gas project as its pilot wells delivered results, desorption was achieved and a 1.2Tcf resource edges closer to development.

news.title: Iran war could trigger global recession, IMF warns
news.snippet: The Treasurer has issued a stark warning after emergency talks as an international body reveals three scenarios that could reshape the world.

news.title: When the war is over, the world won’t be the same
news.snippet: The International Monetary Fund has produced gloomy scenarios for the economic impact of the war in the Middle East. The long-term outlook is worse.

news.title: ASX to gain on oil price drop
news.snippet: The prospect of the US and Iran meeting for more peace talks has taken some sting out of oil prices, pushing ASX futures toward gains.

news.title: ‘Worrying’: Grim warning amid recession fears
news.snippet: A senior Nationals senator has delivered a grim warning for Australia’s economy as recession fears grow and the war in the Middle East rages on.

news.title: The tech jobs bust is real. Don’t blame AI (yet)
news.snippet: Worries about a tech jobs AI-mageddon spread far beyond Silicon Valley. But what’s really behind the lay-off in the technology sector?
